{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Monarch sword
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A [[Monarch sword]] is a weapon not to be used for minor tasks like swatting flies.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4">''Bloodline'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|"You don’t use a Monarch sword to swat flies," Yerin continued.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
